summary: Phase 1: provenance retrofit + dupe-prevention UNIQUE index (v3 §4.1, v3-impl Phase 1)

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Pending pool just deduped (15263 → 15047, 0 dup groups, 0 empty rows). Pre-cleanup baseline: 15371 staged_tags / 2548 edges / 2600 nodes. Post-cleanup canary recorded at ~/guru-backups/guru-20260426T091920Z-pre-dedupe.db. Now is the optimal window for provenance retrofit because all current pending rows came from a single qwen-pass — backfill is unambiguous and the UNIQUE index can be added without conflicts. Web-review tool just shipped; review-driven training-data accumulation depends on prompt_version/model labels from day 1.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Migration spec per v3.md §4.1 + v3-impl Phase 1, plus one addition not in the original v3 spec: a partial UNIQUE index on (chunk_id, concept_id, model, prompt_version) WHERE status='pending'. The partial WHERE matters — once a row transitions to accepted/rejected/reassigned it's frozen audit history; UNIQUE only enforced on pending so future re-tags can't dupe within same provenance. This is the structural prevention the v3 spec leaves to discipline. Under the index, re-running tag_concepts.py with the same model/prompt_version produces a SQL error rather than silent dupes. Bench harness, smart sampling, fine-tuning track all DEFERRED — Phase 1 only here. Bench harness build (3-4 days) waits until first actual model comparison. Fine-tune track gated on >=1500 accepted reviews (currently ~20).

resolution.note: Phase 1 of v3 complete. Provenance retrofit shipped: model+prompt_version columns + dual-bucket backfill (qwen3.5-27b for id>=1000, unknown-pre-v3 for id<1000). Partial UNIQUE index on (chunk_id, concept_id, model, prompt_version) WHERE status='pending' mechanically blocks the re-tag dupe class. PROMPT_VERSION constant in guru/prompt.py. tag_concepts/seed_tags/review_tags/web apply.ts all carry provenance through inserts and reassign-spawn. Parity harness asserts equivalence on (model, prompt_version). 53 pytest + parity green. Phase 2 (bench harness) deferred until first real model comparison; Phase 7 (fine-tuning) gated on >=1500 accepted tags.
